title: Registration Completed Successfully!
message:
Your information has been recorded successfully. Your proposal will now be reviewed, and the list of approved candidates in the PPGI selection process will be published shortly.
Click the "Download Registration Form" button to save a copy of your registration details for your records. When requested, sign the form and submit it to the PPGI/UFAM office located in the Department of Computer Science, Gen. Rodrigo Octávio Jordão Ramos, 3000 – North Sector, Manaus Campus – AM – ZIP 69077-000.
titleButtons: Click the icons below to view or download the corresponding documents.
